title: hedyotis capitellata var. glabra
intro: Hedyotis capitellata var. glabra, also known as Asian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia, characterized by its hairy, oval-shaped leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asian pennywort include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of respiratory tract infections, and improving liver function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Asian pennywort is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and can also be used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and topical creams.
